# Daily Report — 2026-06-11

## Task Completed
Added role management tools: `get_group_roles`, `assign_role_to_group`, `remove_role_from_group`,
and `list_user_roles`. New file `role_tools.py` covers two ServiceNow junction tables:
- `sys_group_has_role` — list/assign/remove roles on a group, with group-by-name and role-by-name resolvers
- `sys_user_has_role` — list roles assigned to a user with optional `include_inherited` filter

All four tools registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml`
(service_desk: read-only pair; system_administrator + full: all four).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1574
- Coverage: 92% total; role_tools.py 95%
- All passing: yes

## Security
No project-level vulnerabilities. System packages (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) have known CVEs
at their pinned dev-environment versions — unrelated to this project's runtime dependencies.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/role_tools.py` (new)
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml`
- `tests/test_role_tools.py` (new, 48 tests)
- `.github/DAILY_BACKLOG.md`
- `.github/daily-reports/2026-06-11.md`
